metadata.description: Lightweight product direction for spec-driven development. Inspired by Linear's fast capture and clean triage, arc helps shape ideas into spec-ready briefs.

plugins.name: arc
plugins.description: Product direction and idea pipeline. Provides /arc-capture for quick idea entry, /arc-shape for refining ideas into spec-ready briefs, /arc-wave for organizing work into delivery cycles, and /arc-review for pipeline health auditing.
